Product Feedback & Suggested Improvement: The instant wallet creation is amazing! It saved me from setting up extensions just to test. I loved seeing the transaction load in real-time. Suggest adding a search bar to easily find different campaigns by reward tokens.

Very beautiful UI. The glassmorphism and animations look premium. I backed the cyberpunk MMO campaign and got reward tokens instantly. It would be helpful to have a transaction history tab inside the wallet dashboard to track all past donations.
Super fast! I tested with my Freighter wallet and everything worked flawlessly. The automatic trustline registration for custom tokens is standard Web3 UX done perfectly. Keep it up!

I really like the concept of rewarding backers with on-chain assets. Suggest adding a category tab menu to let users filter campaigns by tags like Green Energy or Web3 instantly rather than looking through the whole grid.

Perfect implementation of Friendbot account creation. Stellar is definitely the best chain for micropayments and this platform showcases asset issuing capabilities very well. I was able to fund multiple grids instantly.
Aesthetically stunning dashboard! Refilling XLM with Friendbot works. I would love to see a filter or sorting dropdown (sort by deadline
column7: sort by raised percentage) in the next iteration.
